# Diagnosing Autocorrelated Errors {#diagnosing-autocorrelation}

```{r diagnosing-autocorrelation-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/diagnosing-autocorrelation-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/diagnosing-autocorrelation/"
)
```

```{r child-diagnosing-autocorrelation, child="../lecture-content/34-diagnosing-autocorrelation.Rmd"}
```
